summary: Novel power-user workflow layer: post resolve, thread context, and durable post collections.
reason: The generated X API surface exposes endpoint primitives, but agents and power users start from pasted URLs and need stable workflows: resolve a post, understand conversation context, save source material locally, and export it without reassembling URL parsing, local-store lookup, live fallback, dedupe, and formatting glue each time.
validated_outcome: go test ./... covers URL parsing, post normalization, collection argument forms/export formats, thread participant aggregation, and the existing x-twitter package tests.
